get.description: Returns the marketplace id resolved from the provided API key. Use it to verify that your key works end-to-end.

401.description:
Missing or invalid developer API key

Missing or invalid API key (`code: UNAUTHORIZED`).

429.description: Rate limit exceeded on the burst or sustained window (`code: TOO_MANY_REQUESTS`).

get.description: Returns the marchant's products (paginated). By default only enabled products are returned — set `includeDisabled=true` to also return drafts.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Full-text search on product name (min 3 characters).

parameters.name: includeVariations
parameters.description: Include variations and combinations (SKUs) in the response.

parameters.name: includeDisabled
parameters.description: Include disabled (draft) products. Defaults to false — only enabled products are returned.

401.description:
Missing or invalid developer API key

Missing or invalid API key (`code: UNAUTHORIZED`).

429.description: Rate limit exceeded on the burst or sustained window (`code: TOO_MANY_REQUESTS`).

get.description: Returns a single product (with variations, combinations and gallery). Set `includeDisabled=true` to also resolve drafts.

401.description:
Missing or invalid developer API key

Missing or invalid API key (`code: UNAUTHORIZED`).

404.description: The requested resource does not exist (`code: NOT_FOUND`).

429.description: Rate limit exceeded on the burst or sustained window (`code: TOO_MANY_REQUESTS`).

get.description: Returns the merchant's carts (paginated). DRAFT carts are reserved for internal usage and are never exposed.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Full-text search on cart publicId or customer info.

401.description:
Missing or invalid developer API key

Missing or invalid API key (`code: UNAUTHORIZED`).

429.description: Rate limit exceeded on the burst or sustained window (`code: TOO_MANY_REQUESTS`).

post.description: Creates a PENDING_PAYMENT cart with the given customer/items/delivery, generates a payment row, and asks the payment provider for a checkout URL. If the provider call fails, the cart is kept and a 502 PAYMENT_INIT_FAILED is returned — retry via POST /v1/carts/{publicId}/pay.

400.description: Invalid request — malformed parameters or body (`code: BAD_REQUEST`).

401.description:
Missing or invalid developer API key

Missing or invalid API key (`code: UNAUTHORIZED`).

404.description: The requested resource does not exist (`code: NOT_FOUND`).

422.description: The request is well-formed but cannot be processed (`code: UNPROCESSABLE_ENTITY`).

429.description: Rate limit exceeded on the burst or sustained window (`code: TOO_MANY_REQUESTS`).

502.description: The payment provider could not be reached (`code: PAYMENT_INIT_FAILED`). `data.cartPublicId` carries the created cart so the payment can be retried.

post.summary: Create a cart and initiate its payment in one call

get.description: Returns the cart detail (items, totals, delivery info).

post.summary: Compute cart totals without persisting anything

post.description: Only usable when the previous POST /v1/carts call returned 502 PAYMENT_INIT_FAILED — i.e. the cart is in PENDING_PAYMENT with a pending payment row. Re-calls the payment provider with the same payment reference.

401.description:
Missing or invalid developer API key

404.description: The requested resource does not exist (`code: NOT_FOUND`).

422.description: The request is well-formed but cannot be processed (`code: UNPROCESSABLE_ENTITY`).

429.description: Rate limit exceeded on the burst or sustained window (`code: TOO_MANY_REQUESTS`).

502.description: The payment provider could not be reached (`code: PAYMENT_INIT_FAILED`). `data.cartPublicId` carries the created cart so the payment can be retried.

post.summary: Retry payment initialization for an existing cart

get.description: Returns every delivery area configured for the marketplace. Use an area `id` as `delivery.deliveryAreaId` when creating a cart with deliveryType = DELIVERY.

401.description:
Missing or invalid developer API key

Missing or invalid API key (`code: UNAUTHORIZED`).

429.description: Rate limit exceeded on the burst or sustained window (`code: TOO_MANY_REQUESTS`).

get.description: Returns the profile of the marketplace resolved from the API key: slug, business category and payment configuration (pay-on-delivery, split payment).

401.description:
Missing or invalid developer API key

Missing or invalid API key (`code: UNAUTHORIZED`).

429.description: Rate limit exceeded on the burst or sustained window (`code: TOO_MANY_REQUESTS`).

info.title: Xèdo Developer API
info.description: Public REST API for merchants. Authenticate with a Bearer xdk_… key.

developer-api-key.description: Developer API key issued from the merchant dashboard.

code.description: Stable machine-readable error code. Safe to switch on in client code.

message.description: Human-readable error message, translated when applicable.

errors.description: Field-level validation errors, present when the error stems from input validation.

data.description: Contextual data attached to the error. For example, a PAYMENT_INIT_FAILED response carries the `cartPublicId` of the created cart so the payment can be retried via POST /v1/carts/{publicId}/pay.

start.description: Index (1-based) of the first row returned

end.description: Index (1-based) of the last row returned

optionPublicIds.description: Public ids of the options forming this combination.

splitOnlinePaymentPercentage.description: Percentage paid online for split payment. Null falls back to the marketplace default.

galleryMedias.description: Product gallery (image / video). Returned on detail endpoints.

variations.description: Variations (e.g. Size, Color) and their options.

combinations.description: Combinations (SKUs) with per-combination stock and pricing.

meta.description: Developer-supplied metadata attached at cart creation.
Developer-supplied metadata attached at cart creation.
Developer-supplied metadata attached at cart creation.
Developer-supplied metadata attached at cart creation.

returnUrl.description: URL to redirect the customer to after the payment provider checkout. Must be HTTPS.

meta.description: Free-form JSON payload returned as-is in every cart/order response. Use it to attach your own identifiers (e.g. internalOrderId).

id.description: Identifier to pass as `delivery.deliveryAreaId` when creating a cart.

defaultOnlineSplitPaymentPercentage.description: Default percentage paid online for split payment. Null if split payment is disabled.

splitPaymentDeliveryCostHandling.description: Whether the delivery cost is paid online or on delivery in a split payment.
